ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lifters" (
  "lifter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the lifter */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the lifter */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the lifter */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the lifter belongs to (e.g., M_JEM_AAPF, M_JR_AAPF, M_OR_AAPF) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the lifter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the lifter */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the lifter */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the lifter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "event" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., SBD) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the competition */,
  "competition_type" TEXT /* Type of competition (e.g., local, national, international) */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition the event belongs to */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., Squat, Bench Press, Deadlift) */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used for the event (e.g., Multi-ply, Raw) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., squat, bench press, deadlift) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "lifter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lifter */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "weight_class" REAL /* Weight class of the lifter */,
  "best_3_squat" REAL /* Lifter's best 3 squat */,
  "best_3_bench" REAL /* Lifter's best 3 bench press */,
  "best_3_deadlift" REAL /* Lifter's best 3 deadlift */,
  "total" REAL /* Lifter's total weight lifted */,
  "placement" INTEGER /* Placement of the lifter in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_lifter_id FOREIGN KEY ("lifter_id") REFERENCES lifters ("lifter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment (e.g., Multi-ply, Raw) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight_classes" (
  "weight_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight class */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "weight_class" REAL /* Weight class value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weight class */,
  "min_weight" REAL /* Minimum weight for the weight class */,
  "max_weight" REAL /* Maximum weight for the weight class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the judge */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the judge */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the judge */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the judge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_judges" (
  "competition_judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition judge assignment */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the judge in the competition (e.g., head judge, assistant judge) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_judges_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_judges_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifter_coaches" (
  "lifter_coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifter coach assignment */,
  "lifter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lifter */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the coaching relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the coaching relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifter_coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifter_coaches_lifter_id FOREIGN KEY ("lifter_id") REFERENCES lifters ("lifter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifter_coaches_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the receiver */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the message */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., lifter, judge, coach, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "lifter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lifter */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "placement" INTEGER /* Placement of the lifter in the competition */,
  "total_weight_lifted" REAL /* Total weight lifted by the lifter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_lifter_id FOREIGN KEY ("lifter_id") REFERENCES lifters ("lifter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "lifter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lifter */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Type of record (e.g., squat, bench press, deadlift) */,
  "record_weight" REAL /* Weight of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_lifter_id FOREIGN KEY ("lifter_id") REFERENCES lifters ("lifter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "lifter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lifter */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., best lifter, best coach) */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_awards_lifter_id FOREIGN KEY ("lifter_id") REFERENCES lifters ("lifter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_awards_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "lifter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lifter */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "total_weight_lifted" REAL /* Total weight lifted by the lifter */,
  "average_weight_lifted" REAL /* Average weight lifted by the lifter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_lifter_id FOREIGN KEY ("lifter_id") REFERENCES lifters ("lifter_id")
)
